metadata.title: TTG 319 personajes - Prompt Pack v2 Strict Unique
metadata.purpose: Strictly unique transparent character/creature art prompts for Trading Tazos Game
metadata.evolution_policy: All entries are standalone in this v2 pack. Similarity is forbidden unless a future official evolution_family is explicitly assigned.
metadata.global_negative_prompt: Negative prompt: existing franchise character, known collectible monster, known digital monster, known martial-arts anime fighter, direct parody, copyrighted likeness, brand logo, text, watermark, signature, UI, card frame, border, background scenery, multiple characters, cropped limbs, hidden feet unless floating by design, photorealism, realistic human photo, low resolution, muddy details, overcluttered effects, same silhouette as another TTG entry, copied costume, copied hair, copied mascot proportions.

characters.name: Leaflet Pup
characters.silhouette_signature: sapling puppy body; primary read is asymmetric leaf ears, seed-pod paws, tiny bark freckles; face read is leaf-vein eyebrow marks
characters.prompt: Create minimon-001 - Leaflet Pup, an original TTG common grass-type Minimon. Individual design lock: Leaflet Pup is a standalone TTG Minimon: sapling puppy body with asymmetric leaf ears, seed-pod paws, tiny bark freckles, leaf-vein eyebrow marks, three small energy beads following the motion line, and a crescent aura keyed to grass. Element treatment: leaf-vein marks and fresh green energy, never looking like a known plant mascot. Palette: deep violet, jade green, pale gold, and matte charcoal. Render treatment: thick readable 1990s cel-shaded outline with two-level shadow blocks. Pose/composition: defensive pose with one signature feature closest to camera, no cropping; full body visible; 14 percent safe margin; simple transparent alpha only; no background. Rarity treatment: one small rarity accent only: a simple rim glow or tiny sparkle, not overloaded. Must be visually different from every other TTG creature: do not reuse ear shape, tail shape, face markings, aura shape, or body proportions from another entry unless an explicit evolution family says so. Final image: centered circular-tazo readable silhouette, clean edges, high contrast, production-ready transparent PNG.
